# dead-code-hunter Architecture Docs

## Entitys
- [ActionEntry — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/subdomain-actionentry.html): Handles the main execution loop and global error handling. Architecture documentation for the ActionEntry subdomain (part of GitHubAction domain) in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [DeadCodeAnalysis Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/domain-deadcodeanalysis.html): Manages the logic for filtering and interpreting dead code candidates received from the SDK. Architectural overview of the DeadCodeAnalysis domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 2 source files.
- [DiffScoping — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/subdomain-diffscoping.html): Matches analysis findings against the list of changed files in a PR. Architecture documentation for the DiffScoping subdomain (part of DeadCodeAnalysis domain) in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [GitHubAction Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/domain-githubaction.html): The core entry point and integration layer that handles the GitHub workflow environment and orchestration. Architectural overview of the GitHubAction domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 3 source files.
- [InputConfiguration — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/subdomain-inputconfiguration.html): Processes action.yml configuration and environment variables. Architecture documentation for the InputConfiguration subdomain (part of GitHubAction domain) in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [Reporting Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/domain-reporting.html): Transforms raw analysis data into human-readable Markdown for GitHub communication. Architectural overview of the Reporting domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [ResultFiltering — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/subdomain-resultfiltering.html): Implements logic to exclude specific files or directories from reports. Architecture documentation for the ResultFiltering subdomain (part of DeadCodeAnalysis domain) in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [SupermodelSDK Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/domain-supermodelsdk.html): The external dependency providing the core static analysis and call-graph capabilities. Architectural overview of the SupermodelSDK domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [createZipArchive() — dead-code-hunter Function Reference](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/fn-index-ts-createziparchive.html): Architecture documentation for the createZipArchive() function in index.ts from the dead-code-hunter codebase.
- [dead-code.test.ts — dead-code-hunter Source File](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/file-src-tests-dead-code-test-ts.html): Architecture documentation for dead-code.test.ts, a typescript file in the dead-code-hunter codebase.
- [dead-code.ts — dead-code-hunter Source File](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/file-src-dead-code-ts.html): Architecture documentation for dead-code.ts, a typescript file in the dead-code-hunter codebase.

- [filterByChangedFiles() — dead-code-hunter Function Reference](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/fn-dead-code-ts-filterbychangedfiles.html): Architecture documentation for the filterByChangedFiles() function in dead-code.ts from the dead-code-hunter codebase.
